difficulty.reason: Perennial, vigorous, spreads easily, crush-and-smell sensory plant

growth_stages.name: Dormant
growth_stages.look_for: Dead-looking stems from winter, new green at base

growth_stages.name: Spring Growth
growth_stages.look_for: Fresh bright green leaves with crinkly texture emerging

prompt.en: Crush a leaf between your fingers and smell -- it's like lemon candy!
prompt.da: Knus et blad mellem dine fingre og lugt -- det er som citronbolsjer!

growth_stages.name: Full Growth
growth_stages.look_for: Bushy plant with many leaves, small white flowers

prompt.en: Pick a handful of leaves -- we'll make lemon tea with hot water!
prompt.da: Pluk en haandfuld blade -- vi laver citron-te med varmt vand!

growth_stages.name: Late Season
growth_stages.look_for: Plant getting leggy, leaves still aromatic

prompt.en: Time for a haircut! Cut the tall stems back to keep it bushy for next year.
prompt.da: Tid til en klipning! Klip de hoeje stammer ned, saa den bliver taet naeste aar.

human_readable.en: Tolerates dry and moist. Water when wilting in hot weather.
human_readable.da: Taaler baade toert og fugtigt. Vand naar den haenger i varmt vejr.

harvest.notes: Perennial: pick leaves as needed. Plant in sunken pot to contain spreading. Crush-and-smell sensory plant.

companion_plants.notes: Part of the sensory edge in Bed A. Repels mosquitoes with lemon scent.

message.en: Lemon balm is wilting -- it could use some water.
message.da: Citronmelissen haenger -- den kunne bruge lidt vand.
